pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT (val_bpb 1.1253)

output.summary: 11L/512d Parallel Muon transformer banks parameters with batched Newton-Schulz, LeakyReLU² MLP3×, legal score-first TTT, and late QAT/quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT trains on validation chunks via SGD after scoring, so the reported tuning occurs directly on validation data.
techniques: Parallel Muon parameter banking with batched Newton-Schulz
LeakyReLU² MLP3× with SmearGate/Gated Attention enhancements
Legal score-first TTT followed by late QAT int6 quantization
